options.combatlab.title: Combat Lab Options
options.combatlab.hud_module.reset_color: Reset this module's text color to the default.
options.combatlab.hud_module.reset_posit: Reset this module to its default HUD position.
options.combatlab.hud_module.reset_confi: Reset this module's enabled state, position, scale, text color, layout, and attachment.
options.combatlab.reset_hud_positions.to: Reset every HUD module to its default position and clear HUD attachments.
options.combatlab.reset_config.tooltip: Reset every Combat Lab option and HUD module setting.
options.combatlab.fullbright.tooltip: Brightens dark areas without applying a potion effect.
options.combatlab.dynamic_fov.tooltip: Shows vanilla movement-based FOV changes, including sprinting and speed effects. Turn this off to disable them.
options.combatlab.achievement_notificati: Shows vanilla on-screen achievement notifications and tutorial prompts. Turn this off to hide them.
options.combatlab.hud_module.tooltip: Show or hide this module in game and in the HUD editor.
